title: Verify the screen displays '空空如也' when no electronic coupons are available
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with ID 14307. | Verify the screen displays an illustration of a person sitting with their head down and a speech bubble with ellipses. | Check if the text '空空如也' is displayed below the illustration.
expected_result: The screen should display an illustration of a person sitting with their head down and a speech bubble with ellipses. | The text '空空如也' should be displayed below the illustration.

title: Verify the back arrow in the header navigates back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with ID 14307. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user should be navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify the screen is accessible and usable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with ID 14307. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Check if the screen is usable by a user with limited mobility.
expected_result: All elements on the screen should be accessible. | The screen should be usable by a user with limited mobility.

title: Verify data persistence when the app is closed and reopened
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with ID 14307. | Close the app and reopen it. | Verify that the screen still displays '空空如也' when no electronic coupons are available.
expected_result: The screen should still display '空空如也' when no electronic coupons are available.
